frame_analyses.description: Setup screen with dialog box asking to close right handle completely
frame_analyses.technique_notes: System initialization, no surgical activity yet

frame_analyses.description: Needle driver visible with suture already loaded, positioned near Penrose drain with visible black marks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good needle loading technique, proper positioning

frame_analyses.description: Text overlay instructs to pierce through two black dots, needle positioned for first mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear visualization of target marks, proper approach angle

frame_analyses.description: Text overlay indicates to make double-throw knot, instruments actively manipulating suture
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Beginning surgeon's knot formation, appropriate hand positioning

frame_analyses.description: Suture passes through both marks, knot formation in progress with instruments tying
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good suture placement accuracy, active knot tying technique

frame_analyses.description: Text overlay instructs single-throw knot, second throw being executed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper progression to second throw, hands appear to have switched

frame_analyses.description: Text overlay indicates another single-throw knot, third throw in progress
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent technique for final throw, proper hand switching

frame_analyses.description: Dialog asks about changing to shears, cutting phase initiated
Text overlay instructs cutting from both sides, scissors positioned for cutting
Final view showing completed knot with drain closed, suture ends cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed successfully, drain slit appears well closed

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw executed
Single throw with proper hand switching
Final single throw with hand switching, knot appears secure

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well closed with no visible gap, knot properly tightened

technique_summary: Trainee demonstrated proper FLS Task 5 technique with correct surgeon's knot followed by appropriate single throws with hand switching. The suture placement was reasonably accurate and the knot appears secure with good drain closure.
improvement_suggestions: Work on speed efficiency - 245 seconds is significantly above optimal performance
Focus on more precise suture placement to minimize deviation penalties
strengths: Good final knot security and drain closure
